name: drivenlabs-ai
description: Drivenlabs — Claude Code plugins (workspace companion, outbound, automation, Batch.com orchestration). On branche Claude dans les équipes métier.

plugins.name: driven
plugins.description: Compagnon de workspaces collaboratifs Claude — capture mémoire timestampée, factualité en collectif, cross-author, propagation, maintenance des fichiers normatifs.

plugins.name: batch-cep
plugins.description: Orchestre Batch.com (CEP + MEP) en langage naturel — profils, audiences, campagnes omnichannel, catalogues, transactional push, in-app, custom data, GDPR, exports via fetch direct.
